title: Veo 3.1 Lite Released
summary: Veo 3.1 Lite is a cost-effective video generation model available in paid preview. It can be accessed through the Gemini API and tested in Google AI Studio.
body:
Veo 3.1 Lite, the latest video generation model from Google AI, has been released in paid preview. This model is now accessible through the Gemini API, allowing developers to integrate its capabilities into their applications. Additionally, users can test Veo 3.1 Lite in Google AI Studio, exploring its features and potential use cases.

The release of Veo 3.1 Lite marks a significant step in making video generation more accessible and affordable. By offering a cost-effective solution, Google AI aims to democratize access to advanced video generation technologies, enabling a broader range of developers and creators to leverage these capabilities. This move is likely to have implications for various industries, including entertainment, education, and advertising, where video content plays a crucial role.

As Veo 3.1 Lite becomes available for testing and integration, the AI community and developers will be watching closely to see how this model performs and the innovative applications it enables. With its release, Google AI is poised to further push the boundaries of video generation, and it will be interesting to see the reactions and future developments that follow.
twitterThread: 🚀 Just announced: Veo 3.1 Lite, the cost-effective video generation model from Google AI! 🤖
Here's why this matters: Veo 3.1 Lite is now available in paid preview through the Gemini API, making advanced video generation more accessible.
The wild part: this model can be tested in Google AI Studio, giving developers a chance to explore its capabilities and potential use cases.
Let that sink in: with Veo 3.1 Lite, Google AI is democratizing access to video generation technologies, enabling a broader range of creators to produce high-quality video content.
This changes everything for developers and creators looking to integrate video generation into their applications and workflows.
standaloneTweet: Google AI just released Veo 3.1 Lite, a cost-effective video generation model! This game-changing tech is now available in paid preview through the Gemini API. Read more: https://ainformed.dev/articles/veo-3-1-lite-released
